mapper.select: SELECT uf.id, uf.user_id, uf.target_type, uf.target_id, uf.create_time, CASE WHEN uf.target_type = 'activity' THEN a.title WHEN uf.target_type = 'service_item' THEN si.name END as targetTitle, CASE WHEN uf.target_type = 'activity' THEN a.content WHEN uf.target_type = 'service_item' THEN si.description END as targetDescription, CASE WHEN uf.target_type = 'activity' THEN NULL WHEN uf.target_type = 'service_item' THEN NULL END as targetImage FROM user_favorite uf LEFT JOIN activity a ON uf.target_type = 'activity' AND uf.target_id = a.id LEFT JOIN service_item si ON uf.target_type = 'service_item' AND uf.target_id = si.id WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY uf.create_time DESC

SELECT uf.id, uf.user_id, uf.target_type, uf.target_id, uf.create_time, CASE WHEN uf.target_type = 'activity' THEN a.title WHEN uf.target_type = 'service_item' THEN si.name END as targetTitle, CASE WHEN uf.target_type = 'activity' THEN a.content WHEN uf.target_type = 'service_item' THEN si.description END as targetDescription, CASE WHEN uf.target_type = 'activity' THEN NULL WHEN uf.target_type = 'service_item' THEN NULL END as targetImage FROM user_favorite uf LEFT JOIN activity a ON uf.target_type = 'activity' AND uf.target_id = a.id LEFT JOIN service_item si ON uf.target_type = 'service_item' AND uf.target_id = si.id WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} AND uf.target_type = #{targetType} ORDER BY uf.create_time DESC
